check_item: Scope area and WBS clearly defined
Spec and code clause references included
Linked ITP and hold witness points defined
Control points and benchmarks verified
Prerequisite approvals identified (SD/MIR/permits)
Technical datasheet and certificates submitted
Test standard and acceptance criteria numeric
Sampling frequency and lot plan approved
Underground services captured before backfill
Pre-pour method statement approved
Pre-pour hold point checklist signed
Builder's work and MEP sleeves coordinated
Rebar/coupler approvals and traceability verified
Concrete tests and tolerance surveys complete
Masonry method and inspection controls approved
Facade embed/anchor controls approved early
Mockup room and sample boards approved
Gypsum ceiling/partition sequence approved
Special finishes installation controls approved
Concealed MEP pre-close tests complete
Shaft/riser firestopping verified before closure
Waterproofing flood test passed
Kitchen utility and drainage tests accepted
Snag severity matrix and SLA applied
Reinspection completed and evidence attached
NCR CAPA and retest evidence complete where applicable
System-wise commissioning MS approved
Instrument calibration certificates in date
TAB and FPT acceptance achieved
Fire alarm cause-effect and life safety integration passed
Emergency power failover and load shedding tested
ELV and BMS interfaces tested and signed
As-built register complete and approved
O&M and systems manual complete and indexed
Training attendance and competency records complete
Warranty and spare parts register accepted
Asset register and CMMS import delivered
Disposition assigned A/B/C/D/E with comments
notes: A=Approved B=Approved with comments C=Revise&Resubmit D=Rejected E=On Hold
